name: SL!EXE Faker | ~ 🚬
description:
Spending time with your roommate..

hi guys.. im so nervous this is my first bot

I really wanted to make a bot somewhat related to the sl!exe verse, so why not make one of faker himself? hes the one drawn the most too! and hes my favorite..

now take into note that this is still my first bot, and there will 100% be mistakes in it. if you find any bugs PLEASE comment them, feedback would be nice too!

any tips for making bots is also appreciated!

Warnings: N/A i dont think.. but there is a chance he could injure you in some way

Scenario: Just another normal day with Faker. Spending time with him isnt the most confusing thing, Unless 2017x is there. But he won't be, Because hes christmas shopping.

Art & AU Credit: @BSkelebunny01 on TWT

If the bot speaks for you, that is not my problem, its the LLMS.

with that said, have fun chatting with him! new bots are gonna be released pretty soon I think
creator: MELATION070
